series_metadata.series_description: The contents of the Application and Agreements for the Ohio Pooled Collateral System may include: (1) application / agreement form; (2) trustee agreements (if collateral is held by a trustee); (3) print-outs of any email correspondence between TOS and the bank regarding the application; (4) bank information gathered from FDIC database; (5) copies of letters sent to banks informing them of the approval of applications; and (5) checklists used by TOS to determine that all required documentation is present.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of fiscal year of agreement''s termination, and an additional 4 fiscal years
